summary:
• Ukraine-Russia conflict continues to disrupt refining capacity in Eastern Europe, creating localized supply vulnerabilities and potential cascading effects on Western Hemisphere refined product markets.

• US-Iran ceasefire agreement and anticipated Middle East supply normalization risk oversupply conditions by 2027, potentially pressuring crude prices and reducing economic incentives for Western Hemisphere production expansion.

• Sustained shift toward clean energy and electrification, combined with weak diesel demand outlook, threatens long-term demand fundamentals for conventional crude oil across the Americas despite near-term geopolitical support.

articles.title: EnBW secures additional US LNG volumes from Venture Global
articles.description: German energy company EnBW has secured additional US liquefied natural gas (LNG) volumes from Venture Global under new binding agreements for about 0.82 million tonnes per annum (mtpa).
